name: discount-expiry-notifier

scripts.lint:all: pnpm --filter aws lint && pnpm --filter logger lint && pnpm --filter bigquery lint && pnpm --filter email lint && pnpm --filter zuora lint && pnpm --filter internationalisation lint && pnpm --filter product-catalog lint && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog lint && pnpm --filter promotions lint && pnpm --filter discount-expiry-notifier lint && pnpm lint
scripts.check-formatting:all: pnpm --filter aws check-formatting && pnpm --filter logger check-formatting && pnpm --filter bigquery check-formatting && pnpm --filter email check-formatting && pnpm --filter zuora check-formatting && pnpm --filter internationalisation check-formatting && pnpm --filter product-catalog check-formatting && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog check-formatting && pnpm --filter promotions check-formatting && pnpm --filter discount-expiry-notifier check-formatting && pnpm check-formatting
